name: FI - Moomin (1990) (FI)
plot: In the remote and mysterious Moominvalley live the Moomins, gentle and peaceful creatures. Young Moomintroll and his family experience many strange adventures, both magical and mundane. Based on the children's stories by Tove Jansson.
cast: Minami Takayama, Rei Sakuma, Ryusei Nakao, Takehito Koyasu, Mika Kanai, Akio Otsuka, Ikuko Tani, Emiko Shiratori
genre: Animation / Family / Kids / Sci-Fi & Fantasy / Comedy
